programme.title: Alaska State Troopers
programme.desc: Recreation is at its peak in Alaska, but as summer smolders on, so does trouble.

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers
programme.desc: Troopers use the Bering Sea as an airstrip to reach one of the most remote villages in America. North of the Arctic Circle, a wildlife trooper patrols his territory. In the Matsu Valley, troopers race against time to prevent a suicide.

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers
programme.desc: In the remote Alaskan town of Bethel, a special task force is put together to track down a drug dealer; troopers are dispatched to an ATV accident near Sitka Sound.

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers
programme.desc: In the Mat-su, Halloween brings mayhem as Troopers respond to a roadside meltdown and recover a trove of credit cards in different names; the season's first snowfall causes chaos in Fairbanks and in Nome, Troopers bring in a wanted man as a typhoon moves in.

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers
programme.desc: Alaska State Troopers pursue gas thieves, use pepper balls to arrest a barricaded suspect and respond to shots fired in a remote village, showing the risks of policing Alaska's wild terrain.

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers
programme.desc: It's a wild Alaska summer day as troopers locate a naked wolf hunter, track a suspected felon through the woods and respond to an animal hoarder in a remote village just north of the Arctic Circle.

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers
programme.desc: Alaska State Troopers chase a suspect into the woods, apprehend a wanted fugitive and rescue kayakers stranded in the wilderness.

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers
programme.desc: During Alaska's summer solstice, Alaska State Troopers confront a fleeing suspect, defuse an armed barricade and investigate arson near the Arctic Circle; one wild night of endless daylight tests the limits of law in the Last Frontier.

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers
programme.desc: In the Mat-Su, troopers respond to shots fired at winter bonfire and a neighbor dispatching his gun; in Ketchikan, troopers stop a stolen truck.

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers
programme.desc: Mat-Su troopers chase a runner and bust an alleged narcotics dealer. In Fairbanks, a CSU op nets a fugitive running scared, and in Nome, troopers carry out a warrant roundup.

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers
programme.desc: Troopers go undercover to bring down a wanted fugitive, arrest a driver who throws drugs out the window during a traffic stop and engage in a high-speed pursuit on city streets.

programme.title: Alaska State Troopers
programme.desc: In the Mat-Su, Troopers catch a runner connected to an alleged Facebook scam and arrest a suspect wanted on murder charges; in Fairbanks, two hunters are caught butchering a moose in a bank drive-thru.

programme.title: Southern Law
programme.desc: Louisiana police chase down a vehicle after they nearly get struck in a collision; K9 patrol in Marion County Florida enlists an air unit to help them and their dogs track down suspected burglars on the run.
